name: Policy Reference Current
description: The governing PolicyRefID must reference a current, certified policy document (not superseded or revoked).
rationale: Acting under a superseded or revoked policy is a Red failure; PolicyRefID is the FIX analogue of a certified policy reference.

examples.passes: action governed by a current certified policy
examples.fails: action governed by a revoked PolicyRefID

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
